title: 小倉記念の後に・メッキでも

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Heh... I did it, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I got results!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Kokura Fish Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Natiiiie! Can you hear us?!

text_block_list.name: People of Kokura
text_block_list.text: You did sooo weeelll!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Heeey! I can hear you! Thank yoooou!

text_block_list.name: People of Kokura
text_block_list.text: Haha, you go, Natureee!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Heh, do you see them? People from the Kokura
shopping district came to cheer.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
We've only talked a little bit, and they must be
busy too. I can't believe they showed up.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...When people cheer me on like that, it makes
me feel like maybe—just maybe—I'm doing all
right.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I just have to be me and keep moving forward,
step by step.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Even if I don't know if I will ever reach my goal...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...You know what? I'm going to ask something a
little embarrassing now.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Can I win against Teio?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Just joking! Forget that I said anyth—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Oh no... Ummm...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yup, I knew you would say that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm a coward for asking you that despite knowing
your answer, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I need that push to go forward.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Teio... is currently taking on the Classics, which
means that next, she'll be at...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: The Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: So I want to run the Kikuka Sho next too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What... do you think?
choice_data_list:
It'll be a lot longer of a race. That's not a
problem, is it?

It'll be a lot longer of a race. That's not a
problem, is it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is 3,000 meters, 1,000 meters
longer than the Kokura Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It may be an uphill battle for Nice Nature. But if
she has made up her mind, then I'll support her!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You kidding? It's a huge problem. I'm probably not cut out for long-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But... I just don't feel like giving up.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Let's run the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Siiiigh... That's done. The decision has been made.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
There's no turning back now, Nature. Head on to
the big race.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But... yeah. It's not a bad thing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to have regained a little confidence,
but she could probably use a little more of a
boost for the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thinking that, I remember something...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is happy for me, no matter how I do.
They smile and tell me I did a great job.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But by myself, I feel so lost. I can't help but
wonder if I really did my best.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, with first place, it's easy to tell, right?
You get a trophy, or in the case of the Tenno
Sho, a shield-like plaque.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Those trophies are proof you've done your best,
but you only get that with first place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maybe there's something I can do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day, on the way back from Kokura...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer, can I have that snack I left with you?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You know, the sweets that the folks in Kokura
gave me. I thought I'd nibble on them on the
train.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle... Plop...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh, something fell out.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's an... origami... trophy? It looks kinda floppy.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You did, did you? Huh, I didn't expect you to
have such a cute hobby.
choice_data_list: I was going to give it to you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait, what?! Me? But why?
choice_data_list: I wanted to boost your confidence.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: My confidence?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I understand how it can be hard to have
confidence even when you're doing well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that I thought maybe having something
tangible to show for her accomplishments might
give her that extra confidence.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You did this... for me...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You, an adult, were trying to make this origami
trophy in the hotel room?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm not five, you know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I realized after I made it that she might take it as
me treating her like a child, so I've been hesitant
to give it to her.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay, you silly. I'll graciously accept this award.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What are you surprised about? You made this for
me, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: So come on, hand it over. Or I'm not going home.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Think about it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: A floppy origami trophy is perfect for me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The gold foil reminiscent of thin metallic plating,
the crumpled edges.... It's all very... me, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I guess it feels... familiar? What I'm saying is...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I hope the next one will be a bit better, though.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
There will be more races, right? I can't be the only
one working hard!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'll do my best, so I expect more origami trophies.
